name: Canning Fruit-Based Baby Foods
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare any chunk-style or pureed fruit with or without sugar using the procedure for preparing each fruit.
2. Pack into half-pint or pint jars.
3. Refer to Table 1 for processing times in a boiling-water canner.
4. Do not attempt to can vegetables, red meats, or poultry meats, as proper processing times have not been determined for home use.
5. Instead, can and store these foods using standard processing procedures; puree or blend them at serving time.
6. Heat the blended foods to boiling, simmer for 10 minutes, cool, and serve.
7. Store unused portions in the refrigerator and use within 2 days for best quality.
